item.title: Why Is Robinhood Stock Falling After-Hours Despite Record Q4 Revenue?
item.description: The company posted a record Q4 revenue of $1.28 billion, a 27% jump from the year-ago quarter. But it still missed analysts’ estimates of $1.32 billio...

item.title: LYFT Stock Drops 16% After Hours: What’s Driving the Selloff?
item.description: For the current quarter, the company expects adjusted core profit to be $120 million to $140 million, lower at the midpoint than an analyst estimate o...

item.title: What Sent NET Shares Up Over 9% After-Hours Today?
item.description: Cloudflare posted Q4 revenue of $614.5 million, a 34% increase year-over-year, and beating analyst expectations of $591.67 million, according to data ...

item.title: Upstart Stock Rallies 7% After-Hours Today — Who Is The New CEO?
item.description: Upstart also reported total revenue of $296 million in its fourth quarter, a 35% jump from the year-ago quarter.

item.title: Ford Shares Rise After Hours On 2026 Guidance In Line With Analyst Expectations
